description_long: This is a two-story detached house surrounded by a tall, dense hedge, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The house features a dark, hipped roof and a symmetrical front facade with white-framed windows and a central entryway. A driveway leads to a detached garage on the left side, with a car parked in front. The property includes a manicured garden with shrubs and flower beds along the front and side, and a large tree in the rear corner. The rear of the house has additional windows and a small patio area, while the side and back are bordered by the same tall hedge. The overall appearance is classic and elegant, with a blend of traditional and modern residential elements.
description: A two-story house with a dark hipped roof, white-framed windows, and a central entryway, surrounded by a tall hedge and featuring a detached garage and manicured garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central entryway, driveway, garage, and dense hedge.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back windows, patio area, and the garage set behind the house.
description_view_2: Back corner view showing the rear garden, additional windows, and the hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the house's profile, driveway, garage, and the large tree in the rear garden.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a white door, flanked by windows, and a small overhang above the entrance.
